settings.aboutParagraph1: Atlas is a self-hosted business platform that brings CRM, HR, project management, document editing, file storage, e-signatures, and more into a single unified workspace. Built with modern web technologies and designed for teams that want full control over their data.
settings.aboutParagraph2: Unlike cloud-only solutions, Atlas runs on your own infrastructure with the complete source code available. Deploy with Docker in minutes, customize to your needs, and own every byte of your business data — no vendor lock-in, no per-seat pricing, no limits.
settings.displayNameDesc: How your name appears across the platform

apps.crmDesc: Manage deals, contacts, and companies. Track your sales pipeline and close more business.
